description: Implement a bioinformatics toolkit in Python for DNA sequence analysis within the 'seq_toolkit' project. Complete the implementation of nine functions: gc_content, reverse_complement, transcribe, and find_motifs in sequence/basic.py; translate and find_orfs in sequence/translation.py; and melting_temperature, restriction_sites, and codon_frequency in sequence/analysis.py. Follow the specifications provided in the function docstrings to ensure the implementation passes all 28 tests in the 'tests/' directory.
